title: RUSTINS Quick Dry Black Gloss Paint 1L-Fast-Drying Water-Based Coating for Wood and Metal; Durable Hard-Wearing Finish with Smooth Gloss Shine; Low Odour Sustainable Solution for Home and Trade Use
features: Fast-drying black gloss for quick results; Rustins Quick Dry Black Gloss is formulated to deliver a smooth, durable finish that dries rapidly, allowing for faster project completion and minimal downtime

Durable and long-lasting gloss finish; this water-based paint provides a tough, hard-wearing coat that resists chipping, peeling and fading, maintaining its deep black shine over time for wood and metal surfaces

Low odour and easy to clean application; enjoy a convenient painting experience with minimal fumes and simple brush cleaning using water, making it safer for indoor projects and quick maintenance; ADD TO BASKET now

Versatile and sustainable paint formula; suitable for furniture, doors, radiators and trim, Rustins Quick Dry Black Gloss combines high coverage with a sustainable, user-friendly formulation for dependable results

Trusted performance for home and trade users; Rustins’ proven expertise ensures reliable coverage, consistent finish and a good balance between durability, gloss retention and ease of use for professional-quality results

specifications_table.Coverage: 12-15 sq.metres per litre depending on the absorbency of the surface
